description: You are a medical scientist performing 3D volumetric analysis of a human brain MRI scan. Using the 16-bit grayscale MRI image stack at ~/Fiji_Data/raw/mri/mri_stack.tif and voxel dimensions in ~/Fiji_Data/raw/mri/voxel_info.txt, segment and measure the volume of the bright brain tissue (excluding skull and background) and the dark CSF-filled ventricles. For both structures, calculate volume_voxels, volume_mm3, surface_area_mm2, and sphericity. Save the results to ~/Fiji_Data/results/volumetry/volume_measurements.csv with columns: structure_name,volume_voxels,volume_mm3,surface_area_mm2,sphericity. Save orthogonal views (XY, XZ, YZ projections) to ~/Fiji_Data/results/volumetry/orthogonal_views.tif. Save a text report to ~/Fiji_Data/results/volumetry/volumetry_report.txt summarizing both measurements and the ratio of ventricle volume to brain volume.

metadata.dataset: ImageJ MRI Stack - human brain axial MRI
